Failure_Chain: Ingest trigger failure -> incomplete processing -> false release confidence
Required_Controls: PR E2E gate, release-path multi-form validation, transfer SLA

Failure_Chain: Review-gate ambiguity/deadlock -> unresolved workflow state -> non-deterministic sign-off
Required_Controls: Deterministic with-review assertions, production-equivalent approval validation

Failure_Chain: Partial state transition or control drift -> inconsistent form state and approvals
Required_Controls: Lock transition tests, policy hardening, contract + canary checks

Failure_Chain: Stale lock and timeout path -> user contention/edit interruption
Required_Controls: Lock-renew design, lock conflict monitoring, UI/session safeguards

Failure_Chain: OCR/NLP drift -> data integrity degradation -> downstream trust impact
Required_Controls: Threshold governance, drift checks, benchmarked release validation

Failure_Chain: Bad release with weak rollback/restore proof -> prolonged outage/compliance risk
Required_Controls: Alarm coverage matrix, restore drills, complete change controls

Failure_Chain: Biased planning assumptions -> under-scoped controls -> fat-tail overrun -> pressured release decision
Required_Controls: Independent challenge, reference-class forecasting, P80/P95 contingency gates

Failure_Chain: Unsigned artifact transport or trust-policy bypass -> compromised release artifact provenance -> unsafe deployment
Required_Controls: Signed artifact verification, hard-fail scan/SBOM controls, reproducible build attestations

Failure_Chain: Token exposure and non-atomic form updates -> unauthorized/incorrect state transitions -> data integrity failure
Required_Controls: Server-side transition API, conditional writes, duplicate transaction guards

Failure_Chain: LocalStack bypass or verbose execution payload logging -> skipped control path or sensitive telemetry leakage -> compliance/security incident
Required_Controls: Non-local use_localstack hard-fail guards, payload redaction/minimization controls, sensitive-field alerting

Failure_Chain: Payload growth and burst load saturation -> workflow failures/backlog buildup -> delayed processing and release instability
Required_Controls: Payload budget enforcement, SLO/capacity gates, burst rehearsal with rollback thresholds
